text: A-I-D-G-I-G. Tommy, how do you spell your name? I-O-O-P-U-E-W. Do-do-do-E-Y-I-D-O-E-T-H. Now, Tommy's name A-D-D-E-E, A-I-O-O-P-U-E-W-D-D-Y-I-D-D-E-T. Bada-do-e-dee. Yay! Yay! Blast off. T-O-O-U-R-M-M. Good job. P-A-E-O-R-I-E-K-E-K. Patrick's name, good job. How do you spell Alex? E-A-R-A-L-E-E-S. X. E-I-D-M. Allie's name. Good job.
